type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: 2-butoxyethanol exceeded the usage threshold as a result of the production increase of 62% from 2009 to 2010.  2-Butoxyethanol is a constituent in several paints as well as purge solvent.

Two purge solvents were used in 2009, only one of which contained xylene.  Only one of the purge solvents, the one which contained xylene, was used in 2010; therefore, usage and releases of xylene increased correspondingly.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Two purge solvents were used in 2009, only one of which contained xylene.  Only one of the purge solvents, the one which contained xylene, was used in 2010; therefore, usage and releases of xylene increased correspondingly.

Production increased 62% from 2009 to 2010.  In addition, a new purge solvent was used.  The new purge solvent contained different percentages (some higher and some lower) of constituents than the previous purge solvent.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
